title: Mekanism The Factory Must Grow Compatibility
description: Improves compatibility between Mekanism and TFMG
body:
Adds/Changes 85+ recipes to improve compatibility between Mekanism and The Factory Must Grow:
- Removes duplicate Lead and Steel recipes and items
- Adds compatibility with Mekanism Lithium Dust and TFMG Lithium Ores
- Removes duplicate Steel Armor and Tools from Mekanism: Tools
- Also compatible with Mekanism: Generators
- Adds TFMG items (mostly Aluminum and Plastic) to Mekanism recipes
- To start with Mekanism, TFMG Steel production is required
- New recipes for Tier Installers
- Recipes not necessary for compatibility can be disabled in the config if you don't want them

If you want to remove all unused duplicate items from JEI, put the folowing list of items in yourmodpackname/config/jei/blacklist.cfg file:


<details>
<summary>TFMG version below 1.0</summary>

```
mekanism:block_lead
mekanism:ingot_steel
tfmg:raw_lead
tfmg:lead_ingot
tfmg:sulfur_dust
mekanismtools:steel_helmet
mekanismtools:steel_leggings
mekanismtools:steel_chestplate
mekanismtools:steel_boots
tfmg:steel_pickaxe
tfmg:steel_sword
tfmg:steel_axe
tfmg:steel_shovel
tfmg:steel_hoe
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>TFMG version 1.0+</summary>


```
mekanism:ingot_lead
mekanism:nugget_lead
mekanism:ingot_steel
mekanism:nugget_steel
tfmg:sulfur_dust
tfmg:steel_pickaxe
tfmg:steel_sword
tfmg:steel_axe
tfmg:steel_shovel
tfmg:steel_hoe
```


</details>



  
JEI is highly recommended
